members.member: The arguments used when executing the query. These correspond to the bound parameters passed into the [SQLiteQuery] when it was run.
Contains the error message if the query execution failed. If no error occurred, this will be an empty string.
The SQLite error code returned by the last executed query. A value of [code]0[/code] typically indicates success.
The original SQL query string that was executed to produce this result.
The rows returned by the query, stored as an array of dictionaries where each dictionary represents a row mapping column names to values.
